description: What is happening? I can't update.

This package, and others like it that get frequently updated, are essentially support packages for applications that have Gnome dependencies, because flatpaks are isolated from most of your systems packages, there have to be ways to more easily update core dependencies without having to bloat flatpak packages by including them.

That is what this package is, it is a containerised version of all those Gnome dependencies so that any Gnome applications installed will run properly.
summary: For those who wonder why this is needed on Plasma

description: These libraries mean Flatpak Gnome apps can work on KDE. GTK programs alwyas feel smooth and responsive, with no issues.
summary: Lets Gnome apps run on KDE

description:
These are dependiencies that are needed by a Gnome/GTK application you use to function.
 It's not Gnome DE, they're just libraries.
summary: Why you need this even on KDE
